mainEntity.name: How many Papa Johns stores are closing in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns confirmed it plans to close approximately 200 North American stores in 2026, with additional closures bringing the total to up to 300 by end of 2027. This represents roughly 9% of Papa Johns' approximately 3,500 North American locations as of end of 2025.

mainEntity.name: Why is Papa Johns closing stores in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns is closing underperforming franchise locations that are not meeting brand expectations or lack a clear path to sustainable financial improvement. The closures follow seven of eight quarters of same-store sales declines in North America, a 62% drop in net income for 2025, and a difficult consumer environment marked by inflation and reduced discretionary spending.

mainEntity.name: Is Papa Johns going out of business?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Papa Johns is not going out of business. Closing 300 of its 6,000+ global locations is a portfolio optimization, not a shutdown. The company's international business grew 5% in 2025, its balance sheet is strong, and it is actively investing in new menu categories and technology. Papa Johns remains the world's third-largest pizza delivery chain.

mainEntity.name: Which Papa Johns locations are closing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns has not released a specific list of closing locations. Closures will focus on franchise-owned stores that are more than 10 years old, have consistently low sales, or are located too close to other Papa Johns locations. To check your local store's status, use the Papa Johns Store Locator, call the store directly, or check availability in the Papa Johns app.

mainEntity.name: When will Papa Johns stores close?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns expects to close approximately 200 stores by the end of 2026, with the remaining closures completing by end of 2027. No specific timeline has been given for individual store closures. Stores scheduled for closure may be removed from the ordering system before the physical closure date.

mainEntity.name: How many Papa Johns locations are left after closures?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns had approximately 3,500 North American locations at end of 2025. After closing approximately 300 stores, roughly 3,200 North American locations will remain. Globally, Papa Johns operates more than 6,000 restaurants across approximately 50 countries and territories.

mainEntity.name: Are Papa Johns corporate stores or franchise stores closing?

acceptedAnswer.text: The majority of closing stores are franchise-owned locations. Papa Johns CFO Ravi Thanawala specified that closing stores are primarily franchisee-owned and not meeting brand expectations. Corporate-owned locations are largely not part of the closure plan.

mainEntity.name: Did Papa Johns also lay off employees in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Alongside the store closure announcement, Papa Johns disclosed it had cut approximately 7% of its corporate workforce, roughly 49 people from its approximately 700-person corporate staff. These were corporate office positions, not store-level employees.

mainEntity.name: Is Pizza Hut also closing stores in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Pizza Hut announced plans to close approximately 250 underperforming U.S. locations in the first half of 2026 for nearly identical reasons to Papa Johns. Both chains are responding to the same difficult consumer environment, increased competition from Domino's, and the need to rationalize underperforming franchise portfolios.

mainEntity.name: What is Papa Johns doing to recover from store closures?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns is pursuing a multi-pronged recovery strategy: launching new menu items including Oven-Toasted Sandwiches and Pan Pizza, recalibrating ovens for improved food quality, simplifying the menu by cutting Papadias and Papa Bites, investing in digital technology including its Lou AI ordering assistant, and focusing on international expansion where growth remains strong.

mainEntity.name: What are the classic pizzas at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns classic pizzas include four core offerings: Cheese Pizza, Pepperoni Pizza, Sausage Pizza, and Create Your Own Pizza. They are priced from $10.99 for a small to $16.99+ for an extra-large and available in all six crust types.

mainEntity.name: How much does a Papa Johns pepperoni pizza cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: A Papa Johns Pepperoni Pizza costs $10.99 for a small, $12.99 for a medium, $15.78 for a large, and $16.99 for an extra-large on original crust. Prices vary slightly by location.

mainEntity.name: How many calories are in a Papa Johns pepperoni pizza slice?

acceptedAnswer.text: One slice of Papa Johns pepperoni pizza (large, original crust) contains approximately 300-350 calories. Choosing thin crust reduces this to around 200 calories per slice. The Epic Stuffed Crust version has approximately 390-480 calories per slice.

mainEntity.name: How many slices are in a Papa Johns pizza?

acceptedAnswer.text: A Papa Johns small pizza is cut into 6 slices, a medium into 8 slices, a large into 8 slices, and an extra-large into 10 slices. Large slices are noticeably bigger than medium even though both are 8 slices.

mainEntity.name: What is the best classic pizza at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Papa Johns Pepperoni Pizza is the best-selling classic pizza and has been #1 every year since 1984. For mild flavor lovers, the Cheese Pizza is excellent due to the Parmesan-Romano blend. The Sausage Pizza is the most underrated option with bold Italian herb flavor.

mainEntity.name: What crust options does Papa Johns offer for classic pizzas?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns offers 6 crust types: Original Hand Tossed (included), Thin Crust (included), New York Style (included), Epic Stuffed Crust (+$3.00), Garlic Stuffed Crust (+$3.50), and Gluten-Free Ancient Grains Crust (+$2.00).

mainEntity.name: Is Papa Johns classic pizza better than Dominos?

acceptedAnswer.text: For ingredient quality, Papa Johns generally outperforms Dominos — using fresh daily dough, thicker-cut pepperoni, 100% real mozzarella with Parmesan-Romano, and vine-ripened tomato sauce. Papa Johns also includes free garlic sauce and pepperoncini with every order.

mainEntity.name: What is on The Works pizza at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Works pizza at Papa Johns includes pepperoni, julienne-cut Canadian bacon, spicy Italian sausage, fresh-cut onions, crisp green peppers, and mushrooms — six premium toppings total on Papa Johns signature sauce and 100% real mozzarella.

mainEntity.name: How much do Papa Johns Super Loaded Pizzas cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns Super Loaded Pizzas start at $14.99 for a Small (10") and go up to $23.99 for an Extra Large (16"). Epic Stuffed Crust upgrade adds $3.00 and Garlic Stuffed Crust adds $3.50.

mainEntity.name: What is the difference between Super Loaded and Classic Pizzas at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: Super Loaded Pizzas have 4-6 premium toppings versus 1-3 on Classic Pizzas, and cost approximately $4-6 more. Super Loaded Pizzas are specialty pizzas designed for maximum flavor, while Classic Pizzas are simpler crowd-pleasing options.

mainEntity.name: Are Super Loaded Pizzas heavier than regular pizzas?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Super Loaded Pizzas contain significantly more toppings by weight and volume than Classic Pizzas. The extra toppings also make them more calorie-dense, ranging from 260-460 calories per slice depending on the specific pizza and size.

mainEntity.name: What is the Epic Stuffed Crust at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Epic Stuffed Crust bakes warm, gooey mozzarella cheese directly into the outer crust of the pizza. It is available as a $3.00 upgrade on any size Super Loaded or Classic Pizza and adds approximately 60 calories per slice.

mainEntity.name: Which Papa Johns Super Loaded Pizza has the fewest calories?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Super Hawaiian Pizza has the fewest calories among Super Loaded options at approximately 260 calories per slice on a large. The Fiery Buffalo Chicken follows at around 290 calories per slice.

mainEntity.name: Can I customize a Super Loaded Pizza at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, all Papa Johns Super Loaded Pizzas are fully customizable. You can remove or substitute any topping, change the crust type, and add extra cheese or sauce. Customization is available through the Papa Johns website and app order builder.

mainEntity.name: Is the Special Garlic Sauce free with every Papa Johns order?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, the Special Garlic Sauce is complimentary with every Papa Johns order. You can also add extra cups for a small charge through the Dips section when ordering online or via the app.

mainEntity.name: Are Papa Johns breadsticks vegan?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Original Breadsticks are naturally vegan and contain no dairy or animal products. However, the Garlic Parmesan Breadsticks contain dairy from parmesan cheese and are not vegan.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns have bone-in wings?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Papa Johns offers both traditional bone-in wings and premium all-white-meat boneless wings. Both come in multiple flavors including Original, Buffalo, BBQ, and Spicy. Bone-in wings have more flavor and juiciness, while boneless wings are cleaner to eat.

mainEntity.name: How many dipping sauces does Papa Johns offer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns currently offers 9 dipping sauces: Special Garlic Sauce, Ranch, Cheese Sauce, Spicy Garlic Sauce, Blue Cheese, Buffalo Spicy, BBQ, Honey Mustard, and Original Pizza Sauce. Special Garlic Sauce comes free with every order.

mainEntity.name: How many Garlic Knots come in one order at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: A standard order of Papa Johns Garlic Knots contains 8 pieces, served warm with a choice of dipping sauce. Additional dipping sauce cups are available for a small extra charge.

mainEntity.name: How much do Papa Johns Garlic Knots cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns Garlic Knots cost approximately $7.49 for an order of 8 pieces. Prices may vary slightly by location. They contain approximately 110 calories per knot.

mainEntity.name: What is the full Papa Johns menu with prices in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: The complete Papa Johns 2026 menu includes Classic Pizzas ($10.99–$16.99), Super Loaded Specialty Pizzas ($14.99–$23.99), Papadias ($8.99–$10.99), Sides like Garlic Knots ($7.49), Wings ($10.99–$14.99), Desserts ($5.99–$8.99), and Drinks. Prices vary slightly by location.

mainEntity.name: What is the cheapest item on the Papa Johns menu?

acceptedAnswer.text: The most affordable items on the Papa Johns menu are the dipping sauces at $0.50–$0.75 each. Among food items, small Classic Pizzas start at $10.99. Sides and desserts typically start around $4.99–$5.99.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns have a dollar menu or budget options?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns does not have a traditional dollar menu, but regularly offers significant savings through promo codes, BOGO deals, and the Papa Pairings combo deals. Joining Papa Rewards also earns free food on every order.

mainEntity.name: What are Papa Johns Papadias and how much do they cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papadias are Papa Johns folded flatbread sandwiches made with pizza ingredients. Available in flavors including Philly Cheesesteak, BBQ Chicken & Bacon, and Italian. They are priced from approximately $8.99 to $10.99.

mainEntity.name: Are Papa Johns menu prices the same at every location?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns menu prices are generally consistent but may vary slightly by location due to local taxes, franchise pricing, and regional differences. Always check your local Papa Johns app or website for exact prices in your area.

mainEntity.name: What are Papa Johns Papadias?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns Papadias are folded flatbread sandwiches made with the same fresh dough and premium ingredients as Papa Johns pizzas. They are pressed flat and grilled, creating a crispy exterior with a warm, cheesy filling. Available in multiple flavors since 2019.

mainEntity.name: What flavors of Papadias does Papa Johns offer in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns Papadias flavors in 2026 include Philly Cheesesteak (beef, peppers, onions, cheese), BBQ Chicken & Bacon (grilled chicken, bacon, BBQ sauce), Italian (salami, pepperoni, banana peppers), and Grilled Buffalo Chicken & Bacon. Availability may vary by location.

mainEntity.name: How much do Papa Johns Papadias cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns Papadias are priced from approximately $8.99 to $10.99 depending on flavor and location. They are a single-serving item and work well as a meal for one person.

mainEntity.name: How many calories are in a Papa Johns Papadia?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns Papadias range from approximately 620 to 830 calories per full Papadia depending on the flavor. The Philly Cheesesteak is one of the higher-calorie options, while the Grilled Buffalo Chicken tends to be lighter.

mainEntity.name: Are Papa Johns Papadias better than their pizzas?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papadias offer a completely different eating experience from pizzas — more like a gourmet sandwich with a crispy, pressed flatbread exterior. They are ideal when you want pizza flavor in a handheld format, and are great for lunch or solo meals.

mainEntity.name: How many calories are in a Papa Johns pizza?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns pizza calories per slice (large, original crust) range from approximately 260 calories for Cheese Pizza to 390 calories for The Meats. Thin crust reduces calories by about 30%. A full large Pepperoni pizza contains approximately 2,400–2,800 total calories.

mainEntity.name: What is the lowest calorie pizza at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: The lowest calorie Papa Johns pizza is the Thin Crust Cheese Pizza at approximately 180–200 calories per slice. The Super Hawaiian on thin crust is also a lower-calorie specialty option at around 220 calories per slice.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns pizza contain MSG?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, Papa Johns standard ingredients do not contain monosodium glutamate (MSG). This is part of the Better Ingredients commitment that Papa Johns has maintained since the company's founding in 1984.

mainEntity.name: What allergens are in Papa Johns pizza?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns pizzas contain wheat (gluten), dairy (cheese), and may contain soy. Some toppings contain additional allergens. Papa Johns provides full allergen information on their official website. Their gluten-free crust is prepared in shared ovens and is not safe for Celiac disease.

mainEntity.name: How much sodium is in Papa Johns pizza?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sodium in Papa Johns pizza ranges from approximately 530mg to 870mg per slice depending on toppings and crust. Thin crust options tend to have lower sodium. The Cheese Pizza on original crust has approximately 580mg of sodium per large slice.

mainEntity.name: How fast is Papa Johns pizza delivery?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns average pizza delivery time is approximately 30-45 minutes from order placement. Delivery times vary by location, time of day, and distance. You can track your order in real time using Papa Track on the Papa Johns website or app.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns offer contactless delivery?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Papa Johns offers contactless No Contact Delivery by default on all delivery orders. Your order is left at your door and the driver steps back for a safe handoff. This option is available through the Papa Johns website and app.

mainEntity.name: What is the minimum order for Papa Johns delivery?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns delivery minimum order is typically $15, though this varies by location. Many locations offer free delivery on orders over $40. You can check the minimum order for your specific location through the Papa Johns store locator.

mainEntity.name: Can I track my Papa Johns delivery order?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Papa Johns offers Papa Track — a real-time order tracking feature available on their website and app. Papa Track shows you each stage of your order from dough preparation through baking, quality check, and out for delivery.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns deliver through DoorDash or Uber Eats?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns primarily delivers through their own drivers and platform. Some locations may also be available through third-party services like DoorDash. Ordering directly through Papa Johns website or app is recommended to earn Papa Rewards points and access the best deals.

mainEntity.name: What is on the Papa Johns Spicy Italian Pizza?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Spicy Italian Pizza is loaded with a three meat combination of spicy Italian sausage, salami, and pepperoni, served over Papa Johns original tomato sauce and 100% real mozzarella cheese.

mainEntity.name: Is Papa Johns Spicy Italian Pizza very spicy?

acceptedAnswer.text: It has a moderate kick. The heat primarily comes from the spicy Italian sausage and the pepperoni. On a scale of 1 10, most customers rate it at a 4 5 for spice level.

mainEntity.name: How many calories are in a slice of Spicy Italian Pizza?

acceptedAnswer.text: A slice of a large Spicy Italian Pizza on original crust contains approximately 380 calories. A small slice is around 240 calories, while a medium slice is 260 calories.

mainEntity.name: What is the best crust for the Spicy Italian Pizza?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Original Hand Tossed crust is the best choice as it provides a sturdy base for the heavy meat toppings. However, the Epic Stuffed Crust is a popular upgrade for those who want a cheesier finish.

mainEntity.name: How much does the Spicy Italian Pizza cost at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: Prices start at $13.99 for a small and go up to $20.99 for an extra large. A large typically costs $18.99. You can often find it for $14.99 during specialty pizza promotions.

mainEntity.name: How much is Mountain Dew at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: Mountain Dew at Papa Johns costs $2.99 for a 20 oz bottle and $3.49 for a 2-Liter bottle in 2026. Prices may vary by up to $0.50 depending on your region. Third-party delivery apps like DoorDash and Uber Eats charge slightly more than ordering directly through papajohns.com.

mainEntity.name: How many calories in Papa Johns Mountain Dew?

acceptedAnswer.text: A 20 oz bottle of Mountain Dew at Papa Johns contains 290 calories. Per 12 oz serving, Mountain Dew has 170 calories, 46g of sugar, and 55mg of caffeine.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns Mountain Dew have caffeine?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Mountain Dew at Papa Johns contains approximately 55mg of caffeine per 12 oz, or roughly 91mg in a 20 oz bottle. This is higher than regular Pepsi (38mg per 12 oz). Mountain Dew Zero Sugar contains even more caffeine at 68mg per 12 oz.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns have Mountain Dew Zero Sugar?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Mountain Dew Zero Sugar is available at Papa Johns for $2.99 for a 20 oz bottle. It has 0 calories, 0g sugar, and uses sucralose and acesulfame potassium as sweeteners. Note that Mountain Dew Zero Sugar contains slightly more caffeine (68mg per 12 oz) than regular Mountain Dew (55mg per 12 oz).

mainEntity.name: What size Mountain Dew does Papa Johns have?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns carries Mountain Dew in two sizes: 20 oz bottle for $2.99 and 2-Liter bottle for $3.49. The 2-Liter provides approximately 5 to 6 servings of 12 oz and is the best value for orders feeding 3 or more people.

mainEntity.name: What pizza goes best with Mountain Dew at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: Mountain Dew pairs best with spicy and bold-flavored pizzas. The Fiery Buffalo Chicken Pizza, Pepperoni Pizza, and spicy wing orders are the top pairings. The citrus acids in Mountain Dew provide contrast to capsaicin heat, resetting your palate between bites. For milder or veggie-based pizzas, Pepsi or Aquafina are better choices.

mainEntity.name: Can I order just Mountain Dew from Papa Johns without food?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Papa Johns allows standalone drink orders via their website, app, and delivery partners like DoorDash and Uber Eats. You can order Mountain Dew without adding any food items to your cart, though delivery fees still apply.

mainEntity.name: Is Mountain Dew gluten-free and vegan at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes on both counts. Mountain Dew contains no gluten-containing ingredients and no animal-derived ingredients. It is suitable for customers with celiac disease, gluten sensitivity, or vegan diets.

mainEntity.name: Is Mountain Dew the most popular drink at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pepsi is the highest-volume drink at Papa Johns nationally. However, Mountain Dew has a dedicated fan base particularly among customers who order spicy or meat-heavy pizzas. The 2025 Papa Johns x Mountain Dew Cini Dirty Soda collaboration demonstrated the strong cultural connection between this drink and the Papa Johns brand.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns still have Mountain Dew in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Mountain Dew is a permanent item on the Papa Johns drinks menu in 2026 and is available at all US locations. Papa Johns is an official PepsiCo partner, which means Mountain Dew is part of the standard national menu alongside Pepsi, Diet Pepsi, Starry, and Aquafina.

mainEntity.name: How much is Pepsi at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pepsi at Papa Johns costs $2.99 for a 20 oz bottle and $3.49 for a 2-Liter bottle in 2026. Prices may vary by up to $0.50 depending on your region. Third-party delivery apps like DoorDash and Uber Eats charge slightly more than ordering directly through papajohns.com.

mainEntity.name: How many calories in Papa Johns Pepsi?

acceptedAnswer.text: A 20 oz bottle of Pepsi at Papa Johns contains 250 calories. Per 12 oz serving, Pepsi has 150 calories and 41g of sugar. For zero-calorie options, Papa Johns carries Diet Pepsi and Pepsi Zero Sugar.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns have Pepsi or Coke?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns exclusively serves Pepsi products. Papa Johns is an official PepsiCo partner and does not carry Coca-Cola, Sprite, or Fanta at any US location. This partnership began in 2019.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns Pepsi have caffeine?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Pepsi at Papa Johns contains 38mg of caffeine per 12 oz, or approximately 63mg in a 20 oz bottle. This is similar to Diet Pepsi (36mg) but less than Mountain Dew (55mg).

mainEntity.name: What sizes does Papa Johns Pepsi come in?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns carries Pepsi in two sizes: 20 oz bottle ($2.99) and 2-Liter bottle ($3.49). The 2-Liter yields approximately 5–6 standard 12 oz servings.

mainEntity.name: What pizza goes best with Pepsi at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pepsi pairs best with meat-topped and cheese-heavy pizzas like Pepperoni Pizza, The Works, and The Meats. The caramel sweetness and carbonation cut through the savory richness effectively.

mainEntity.name: Can I order just Pepsi from Papa Johns without food?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Papa Johns allows standalone drink orders via their website, app, and delivery partners like DoorDash and Uber Eats. You can order Pepsi without adding any food items to your cart, though delivery fees still apply. Ordering directly through papajohns.com or the Papa Johns app is recommended to earn Papa Rewards points.

mainEntity.name: Are Papa Johns Papadias discontinued in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Papa Johns officially announced on February 27, 2026 that Papadias would be discontinued in Q2 2026. The removal began rolling out from March 2026 onwards alongside the launch of the new Oven-Toasted Sandwiches.

mainEntity.name: Why did Papa Johns discontinue Papadias?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns discontinued Papadias for three main reasons: (1) they disrupted kitchen operations and slowed down pizza orders, (2) the company needed menu simplification as part of its 2026 transformation plan, and (3) the brand was cutting costs while closing 300 underperforming stores.

mainEntity.name: What replaced Papadias at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns launched three new Oven-Toasted Sandwiches in March 2026 as the replacement: Philly Cheesesteak, Chicken Bacon Ranch, and Steak & Mushroom. These are served on ciabatta bread at $7.99 each.

mainEntity.name: When were Papadias removed from the menu?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papadias began disappearing from US locations in late March/early April 2026 following the launch of the new Oven-Toasted Sandwiches on March 30, 2026. Full removal was scheduled for Q2 2026.

mainEntity.name: Are Papadias still available in Canada?

acceptedAnswer.text: Reports suggest Papadias may still be available at some Canadian Papa Johns locations as of April 2026. Check your local Canadian Papa Johns app for current menu availability.

mainEntity.name: What were all the Papadia flavors?

acceptedAnswer.text: The permanent Papadia flavors were: Italian, Philly Cheesesteak, Grilled BBQ Chicken & Bacon, Meatball Pepperoni, and Grilled Buffalo Chicken. Limited-time flavors included Doritos Cool Ranch (chicken, beef, steak) and Double Cheeseburger.

mainEntity.name: How much did Papadias cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papadias were originally priced at $6 when launched in 2020. By 2024-2026, the price had increased to $8.99. A Parmesan Crust upgrade was available for an additional $1.

mainEntity.name: Are the new toasted sandwiches as good as Papadias?

acceptedAnswer.text: This depends on personal preference. Papadias were unique for using Papa Johns' pizza dough, creating a hybrid pizza-sandwich experience. The new Oven-Toasted Sandwiches use ciabatta bread and are more of a classic sandwich format. Many fans prefer the Papadia style, while others appreciate the more straightforward toasted sandwich.

mainEntity.name: Will Papadias come back as a limited-time item?

acceptedAnswer.text: As of April 2026, Papa Johns has not announced any plans to bring Papadias back — even as a limited-time offer. However, Papa Johns has previously brought back discontinued LTO items, so a temporary return is possible in the future.

mainEntity.name: What were Papa Bites?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Bites were bite-sized, oven-baked pockets of fresh pizza dough filled with various ingredients. They were introduced around 2022 and discontinued alongside Papadias in Q2 2026 for the same operational efficiency reasons.

mainEntity.name: How much does a small Papa Johns pizza cost in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: A small Papa Johns pizza starts at $8.99 for a cheese pizza (0 toppings) and goes up to $12.99 for specialty pizzas like The Works or BBQ Chicken Bacon. A 1-topping small (e.g., pepperoni) costs approximately $9.99. Prices may be slightly higher in major urban markets. Always check current local prices via the Papa Johns app or papajohns-menus.us.

mainEntity.name: How big is a small Papa Johns pizza?

acceptedAnswer.text: A small Papa Johns pizza is 10 inches in diameter and is cut into 6 slices. It serves 1–2 people and has approximately 78.5 square inches of pizza surface. It is larger than a personal pan pizza but significantly smaller than the medium (12 inch) or large (14 inch) options.

mainEntity.name: How many slices does a small Papa Johns pizza have?

acceptedAnswer.text: A small Papa Johns pizza comes with 6 slices. This is standard for all small size orders regardless of crust type or toppings. By comparison, medium and large pizzas both come with 8 slices, and XL comes with 10 slices.

mainEntity.name: Is the small pizza available with stuffed crust at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. The Epic Stuffed Crust and Garlic Epic Stuffed Crust are only available on large (14 inch) pizzas at Papa Johns. They are not offered on small or medium sizes. If you want stuffed crust, you need to order a large pizza.

mainEntity.name: What is the cheapest pizza at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: The cheapest pizza at Papa Johns is the small cheese pizza at approximately $8.99. This is a 10-inch, 6-slice cheese pizza with original crust and no toppings. Using a promo code from the Papa Johns coupons page can reduce this price further.

mainEntity.name: Is the small or medium better value at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: The medium is better value on a price-per-slice basis. A medium cheese pizza at approximately $11.09 gives 8 slices at $1.39 per slice, while a small at $8.99 gives 6 slices at $1.50 per slice. The large is the best value of all three sizes. The small only makes financial sense if you genuinely cannot eat a medium, need the gluten-free crust, or want two different pizza flavors by ordering two smalls.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns have a gluten-free small pizza?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Papa Johns offers a Gluten-Free Crust exclusively in the small (10 inch) size. It is made with ancient grains and costs approximately $1.00 to $2.00 more than the standard original crust small. However, it is prepared in the same kitchen as wheat-based products, so it is not suitable for those with celiac disease — only for mild gluten sensitivity.

mainEntity.name: How many calories are in a Papa Johns small pizza?

acceptedAnswer.text: A single slice of a small Papa Johns Cheese Pizza (original crust) contains approximately 180 calories. The full small cheese pizza (6 slices) is approximately 1,080 calories total. A small Pepperoni Pizza slice is around 210 calories. Thin crust reduces this by roughly 20 to 30 calories per slice, and gluten-free crust is the lightest at around 150 calories per slice.

mainEntity.name: Can I order a small pizza for delivery at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The small pizza is available for both delivery and carryout at all Papa Johns locations. Ordering via the Papa Johns app or website is recommended for the best pricing, promo code access, and to earn Papa Rewards points. Delivery fees and minimum order requirements may apply depending on your location.

mainEntity.name: What toppings are available on Papa Johns small pizzas?

acceptedAnswer.text: All standard Papa Johns toppings are available on the small pizza, including pepperoni, sausage, chicken, beef, Canadian bacon, mushrooms, green peppers, onions, black olives, banana peppers, and jalapeños. Specialty pizza builds like The Works and BBQ Chicken Bacon are also available in small. The only limitation is crust type — stuffed crust and New York Style are large-only options.

mainEntity.name: How does Papa Johns small pizza price compare to Domino's?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns and Domino's small pizzas are similarly priced — both around $8.99 to $9.99 for a cheese or 1-topping small. Papa Johns has an advantage in dough quality (fresh, never-frozen) and includes a free Special Garlic Sauce with every order that Domino's charges extra for.

mainEntity.name: Is there a Papa Johns 50% off deal today?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — the Papa Johns carryout special gives you 50% off all regular menu-priced pizzas automatically when you choose carryout at checkout. No code needed. This deal is available every day at most US locations. For delivery orders, use the BOGO code BOGO4U for equivalent savings on two pizzas.

mainEntity.name: What is the Papa Johns 50% off carryout code?

acceptedAnswer.text: No code is needed for the Papa Johns 50% off carryout deal. Simply select Carryout as your order type on PapaJohns.com or the app, add your pizzas, and the 50% discount applies automatically at checkout.

mainEntity.name: Does the Papa Johns 50% off deal work on all pizzas?

acceptedAnswer.text: The carryout 50% off deal applies to all regular menu-priced pizzas of any size or crust type. It does not apply to already-discounted bundles or promotional combo items. Sides, drinks, and desserts are not included in the 50% off discount.

mainEntity.name: Can I get 50% off Papa Johns on delivery?

acceptedAnswer.text: The automatic 50% off deal only applies to carryout orders. For delivery, the best equivalent deal is the BOGO offer using code BOGO4U, which gives you a second large pizza free — effectively 50% off when ordering two pizzas. Orders of $40 or more also get free delivery, which reduces the overall cost significantly.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns do 50% off every day?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — the carryout 50% off special is an ongoing everyday deal at most Papa Johns locations in the US. It is not limited to specific days of the week. The old Thursday deals that Papa Johns used to run have been replaced by this everyday carryout special.

mainEntity.name: How do I get Papa Johns 50% off in the UK?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns UK runs separate promotions from the US. For UK 50% off deals, visit the official Papa Johns UK website at papajohns.co.uk or check the Papa Johns UK app, which shows location-specific deals for UK addresses. US promo codes will not work on UK orders.

mainEntity.name: Can students get 50% off at Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: There is no permanent nationwide Papa Johns student discount at 50% off. Students can access deals through UNiDAYS, local franchise promotions, and the standard carryout 50% off special which is available to all customers regardless of student status.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns offer 50% off for veterans?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns offers a military and veterans discount at participating locations, typically ranging from 10% to 25% off. This is separate from the standard 50% off carryout deal. Show a valid military ID or veteran card at the counter for carryout orders. The carryout 50% off special is available to all customers including veterans and requires no verification.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns have sandwiches now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Papa Johns launched three Oven-Toasted Sandwiches on March 30, 2026: Philly Cheesesteak, Chicken Bacon Ranch, and Steak & Mushroom. All three are served on ciabatta-style bread brushed with Papa Johns' signature Special Garlic Sauce and toasted in the chain's pizza ovens. This is Papa Johns' first full sandwich menu category in its 42-year history.

mainEntity.name: How much do Papa Johns sandwiches cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns Oven-Toasted Sandwiches cost .99 each when ordered individually. Through the Papa Pairings deal, ordering two or more items brings the price to .99 each. A sandwich bundled with a Pepsi-Cola beverage starts at .49. Promo codes from the coupons page can reduce the price further.

mainEntity.name: What sandwiches does Papa Johns have in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns currently offers three sandwich flavors in 2026: Philly Cheesesteak (seasoned steak, roasted onions and peppers, pizza ranch sauce, white American cheese), Chicken Bacon Ranch (grilled white meat chicken, bacon, diced tomatoes, banana peppers, pizza ranch sauce, white American cheese), and Steak & Mushroom (seasoned steak, roasted mushrooms and onions, garlic truffle sauce, white American cheese). All three are served on ciabatta bread brushed with Special Garlic Sauce.

mainEntity.name: How many calories are in a Papa Johns sandwich?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Philly Cheesesteak contains 780 calories, 34g fat, 71g carbohydrates, 52g protein, and 2,770mg sodium. The Chicken Bacon Ranch is approximately 740 calories with slightly less fat and sodium. The Steak & Mushroom is the lightest at approximately 720 calories and 2,490mg sodium. All three sandwiches are complete, filling meals.

mainEntity.name: Are Papa Johns sandwiches better than Papadias?

acceptedAnswer.text: They are different products that serve different purposes. Papadias were a unique pizza-flatbread hybrid with no real fast food equivalent. The Oven-Toasted Sandwiches are full ciabatta-style subs competing directly in the sandwich category. For customers who loved Papadias for their uniqueness and pizza-inspired character, the sandwiches feel like a step toward convention. For customers who simply want a good hot sandwich at .99, these deliver.

mainEntity.name: Which Papa Johns sandwich is the best?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Steak & Mushroom is the best of the three, rated 8.5 out of 10. The garlic truffle sauce gives it a complexity and depth that the other two sandwiches lack. The Chicken Bacon Ranch (7.5 out of 10) is the most crowd-pleasing and safest first-time order. The Philly Cheesesteak (6.5 out of 10) is the most familiar but is held back by the pizza ranch sauce substituting for traditional Philly condiments.

mainEntity.name: Did Papa Johns sandwiches replace Papadias?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Papa Johns discontinued Papadias and Papa Bites in early 2026 and launched the Oven-Toasted Sandwiches on March 30, 2026 as the new handheld menu category. Papadias were removed because they added incremental sales but disrupted the chain's normal operational workflows. Papadias are still reportedly available in Canada.

mainEntity.name: Are Papa Johns sandwiches available for delivery?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. All three Papa Johns Oven-Toasted Sandwiches are available for both delivery and carryout at participating locations nationwide. Order through the Papa Johns website, app, or by phone. The website and app offer the best pricing, promo code access, and Papa Rewards points earning.

mainEntity.name: Can I use a promo code on Papa Johns sandwiches?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Most Papa Johns promo codes apply to sandwich orders. Check the Papa Johns Coupons page before every order for active deals — percentage-off codes of 20 to 40 percent appear regularly and can bring the per-sandwich price below .

mainEntity.name: What is the garlic truffle sauce on the Steak & Mushroom sandwich?

acceptedAnswer.text: The garlic truffle sauce is Papa Johns' new signature sauce exclusive to the Steak & Mushroom Oven-Toasted Sandwich. It combines garlic flavoring with truffle notes to create a rich, earthy, savory sauce that is more complex than the pizza ranch used on the other two sandwiches. It is the most distinctive and impressive sauce Papa Johns has introduced in recent years.

mainEntity.name: Is Papa Johns better than Pizza Hut?

acceptedAnswer.text: For most orders in 2026, Papa Johns is the better choice. Papa Johns wins on ingredient quality, fresh dough, sauce, stuffed crust, and app experience. Pizza Hut wins on Pan Pizza, menu variety, and large family bundle deals like the Big Dinner Box. In a head-to-head comparison across 12 categories, Papa Johns scores 7 wins versus Pizza Hut's 4, with 2 ties.

mainEntity.name: Which is cheaper — Papa Johns or Pizza Hut?

acceptedAnswer.text: For pizza-only orders, prices are similar — Papa Johns averages $18.91 for a large pepperoni versus Pizza Hut's $18.65. For full family meals including sides, pasta, and extras, Pizza Hut tends to be cheaper due to bundle deals like the Big Dinner Box at $24.99. Papa Johns with a promo code often matches or beats Pizza Hut pricing. Always check for coupons before ordering either chain.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns or Pizza Hut have better stuffed crust?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns has the better stuffed crust in 2026. The Garlic Epic Stuffed Crust, with its garlic parmesan exterior baked onto the ciabatta-style edge, gives it a toasted, savory crunch that Pizza Hut's plain mozzarella stuffed crust cannot match. Pizza Hut invented stuffed crust in 1995 and has a nostalgia advantage, but Papa Johns' Garlic Epic variety is the more flavorful product.

mainEntity.name: Which has better delivery — Papa Johns or Pizza Hut?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns and Pizza Hut are roughly equal on delivery speed, both averaging 30 to 45 minutes depending on location and time of day. Neither chain competes with Domino's on delivery technology. Papa Johns has a slight edge in app usability — their ordering flow is cleaner and the Papa Pairings deal is easier to navigate than Pizza Hut's bundle configurations.

mainEntity.name: Does Papa Johns or Pizza Hut have better dough?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns has better dough for most crust styles due to their fresh, never-frozen policy. The difference is noticeable — Papa Johns original crust has a lightness and chew that frozen or pre-made dough cannot replicate. However, Pizza Hut's Original Pan Pizza is a genuine exception — their thick, buttery, caramelized-bottom pan crust is the best in the category and Papa Johns has no equivalent.

mainEntity.name: Which pizza chain has a better loyalty program — Papa Johns or Pizza Hut?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns' Papa Rewards program has a slight edge due to its lower redemption threshold — you need to spend $75 before your first free reward versus Pizza Hut's Hut Rewards which requires $100 in spending at 2 points per dollar. Both programs are free to join. Hut Rewards earns points at a higher rate (2x per dollar versus Papa Johns' 1x), which benefits heavy users over time.

mainEntity.name: Does Pizza Hut or Papa Johns have more menu variety?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pizza Hut has significantly more menu variety. They offer pasta, a Personal Pan Pizza, Cheesy Bites crust, Melts, and a broader dessert selection. Papa Johns trimmed their menu in early 2026, discontinuing Papadias and Papa Bites to simplify operations, replacing them with Oven-Toasted Sandwiches. Papa Johns is now more focused on pizza with quality sides, while Pizza Hut covers a broader range of meal types.

mainEntity.name: Are both Papa Johns and Pizza Hut closing stores in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Papa Johns confirmed plans to close approximately 200 North American stores in 2026, with additional closures bringing the total to up to 300 by end of 2027. Pizza Hut also announced approximately 250 U.S. store closures in the first half of 2026. Both chains are rationalizing underperforming franchise locations in response to declining same-store sales and a difficult consumer environment.

mainEntity.name: Which chain has better wings — Papa Johns or Pizza Hut?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pizza Hut offers a lower cost-per-wing at approximately $1.85 per wing versus Papa Johns at approximately $1.52 per wing — making Papa Johns the better value on wings specifically. For flavor variety, both chains offer multiple sauce options including Buffalo, BBQ, and garlic parmesan. Papa Johns wings include the free Special Garlic Sauce dip, while Pizza Hut charges extra for dipping sauces.

mainEntity.name: What does Papa Johns do better than Pizza Hut?

acceptedAnswer.text: Papa Johns is better than Pizza Hut in 2026 in these areas: fresh never-frozen dough quality, tomato sauce freshness, stuffed crust (especially the Garlic Epic variety), free Special Garlic Sauce included with every order, app usability, and overall ingredient quality including pepperoni and mozzarella. Papa Johns also has a more coherent turnaround strategy under new CEO Todd Penegor compared to Pizza Hut's current direction.

mainEntity.name: What does Pizza Hut do better than Papa Johns?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pizza Hut is better than Papa Johns in 2026 in these areas: Original Pan Pizza with its thick buttery caramelized-bottom crust, menu variety including pasta and more specialty pizza options, large family bundle deals like the Big Dinner Box, overall value for groups ordering multiple item types, and dine-in experience where still available.
